'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 138''' was the one hundred thirty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 18]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Republic 54|Vos's Mission]]
*[[Bear Clan]]
*[[Malta]] the Hutt
*[[Silver Fyre/Legends|Silver Fyre]]
*Healing and Healers
*[[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Labria]]
*Waste Disposal
*[[Deflector shield/Legends|Deflector shields]]
*[[Sheathipede-class transport shuttle/Legends|Neimoidian Shuttle]]
